caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. In the background, a white headless mannequin wears a white shirt, and various garments hang on a rack. To the left and right of the screen, logos are visible, including one that reads "PODCAST" and another that reads "BOOST FLY TOY". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly. He begins with an open mouth, shifts into a more closed-mouth expression, and then transitions into a slight smile. The camera remains static, capturing his facial expressions and movement as he engages in a conversation.
